project_area: Arts and culture projects that directly and actively engage the public
demographic_requirements: Artists must live in Rhode Island for at least one year, be 18+ years old, and engage underserved communities as defined by the NEA.
eligibility_summary: Open to Rhode Island artists (18+) who have lived in the state for at least one year. Projects must be artist-led, engage the public, and not be part of a formal nonprofit entity. Ineligible applicants include current RISCA staff, immediate family members, high school students, and those enrolled in arts degree programs.
